<!-- Mirrors the framework-feedback skill /request-apexyard-feature (files
     upstream to me2resh/apexyard). Lead with the problem, not the solution.
     Distinct from /feature, which files into your own project. -->

## Problem

<!-- What's awkward or missing today? The friction, not the fix. -->

## Proposed behaviour

<!-- What should the framework do? Name it concretely — a new skill / hook /
     rule / agent / workflow change. -->

## Why it helps adopters

<!-- Who benefits and how; what they do instead today. -->

## Scope / out of scope

<!-- Optional: anything explicitly not included, or a rough size. -->
